front_and_street_side.max_height_note: Within front yard and area between street and front facade; corner lots also 3ft within 2ft of street-side lot line and 10ft past front setback line
front_and_street_side.height_measurement: From top of adjacent sidewalk if present, else ground level

interior_side_and_rear.max_height_note: MDC does not set explicit rear/side max height in 26-7A-7; screening buffers may require 6ft opaque fence per 26-7C. City FAQ: fences generally along rear/side; front setback 25ft from front property line per staff guidance.

prohibited_materials: sharp points on top or sides

accessory_structures.height: Must comply with zoning district height limit

setbacks_ft.front: No closer than principal building facade or 60ft, whichever is less

clear_vision_triangle.note: Fences must not obstruct corner visibility at street intersections

parking.note: Off-street parking standards by use and district — see code_chunks for details

screen_types.D: Open-pattern fence or wall, 3-6 ft, 40%+ opacity
screen_types.E: Opaque fence or wall, 4-8 ft, complete visual separation
